description: A new 'Notice to Mariners' (NTM) has been issued regarding dredging operations at Bramble Bank. Implement this exclusion zone in Bridge Command for training purposes by creating a scenario at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/NTM 42 Implementation/'. Using the coordinates provided in '/home/ga/Documents/NTM_2024_042.txt', configure the scenario files ('environment.ini', 'ownship.ini', and 'othership.ini') for the 'Solent' location. The exclusion zone must be marked by four stationary buoys (model 'buoy_special') at the corners and one stationary dredger vessel (model 'coastal_tanker' or 'dredger') at the center. Position the own ship safely outside the zone.
